questions.question: Define e-waste and explain its impact on the environment. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the effects of e-waste on ecosystems and human health

questions.question: What are some common materials found in e-waste and how can they be recycled? (5 marks)
questions.hint: List at least two common materials and their recycling methods

questions.question: Describe the differences between hazardous and non-hazardous e-waste. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the characteristics of each type of e-waste and its management implications
